meaning: n.杩借釜,杩芥煡,鎻忔懝,鎽瑰浘,鏄捐抗v.杩借釜
examples: She learned to draw by tracing pictures out of old storybooks.
The public is urgently requested to assist police in tracing this man.
The research effort has focused on tracing the effects of growing levels of five compounds.
The Pacific Coast Highway stretches out ahead, tracing rocky headlands and gentle sandy bays.
One clue comes from ATF agent Charles Houser, head of their National Tracing Center Division.
